posts.raw_content:
Last week I was assigned to a work project for 5 days.   A big loud She-Boon had hired a team of blacks she knew from back home-- and her 'back home' is the South Side of Chicago.

On day 1, the big one wore a T-shirt which said "2024 Hip-Hop Cruise -- Miami to Jamaica."     

Her assistant introduced herself as being "from Africa" but she named a different African country-- every time someone asked "where in Africa?".    That one was under 30, but looked like Joy Reed.  She was all dark & shiny with some kind of oil, but she must routinely miss a strip-- 2 inches of grey dead skin zombie flesh from under her wig-- down the back of her neck & shoulder-- down her collar.   

The highest-ranking male couldn't figure-out how screw caster wheels to the bottom of an office chair.    But he was quiet & careful.   A good idea, if you don't know anything.   He looked like Lavarr Burton.  He claimed to be 39, but his beard had a lot of grey in it-- and he listened to Mariah Carey music & Ludcriss-- so he's probably older.    Odds are-- he was raised by a pushy loud obese single mom--    and so he knew to Never Disagree with anything one of those says-- even to help save her from herself-- lest he suffer their beast wrath.    The meal reimbursement was decent-- and there were lots of good restaurants to choose from.  But ate at McDonald's and Popeyes every day.   When he got tired, he would sigh and mutter "Oh, Lawdy!" which I found amusing & colorful.  Far better than "Eat A Mofo Ass!" or whatever they say these days.

The big one ventured to Chipotle one day-- but then declared "I think I'm lactose intolerant!" when she couldn't hide the enormous fart clouds she emitted that afternoon.

They hired an all-black security firm to guard the jobsite overnights-- but then they had a big worried discussion about whether there was room in the budget for security cameras to prevent their own security guards from stealing while unsupervised.

I work with all-sorts of people.   But I felt like I was losing IQ points every time this crew made a group-decision.     When I asked the big one straightforward questions, like "What are you working on at the moment?"  ...she would react with a flash rage in her eyes/ barely contained...    

and then completely fail to just literally answer the question.  Instead she would say some defensive shit, as if I was accusing her of something.  

I could go on venting.   But you get the idea.

oh-- one more thing-- the big one is on some "kink dating" site.  I don't know if it's just for blacks.  But she's in the black part of it.   She blabbed about the fetishes listed in her profile & the profiles she was looking at-- acronyms like BBW BDSM CBT MMF etc.  She was exchanging texts with some gay-looking muscular black named...  DeLorean.

I'm sure she pays for their dates, and... just imagine!  eww.
